content.query:
/*******************************************************************************************************
  Author:       Rene Villarreal
  Create Date:  August 3, 2022
  Description:  Create view v_ShipDays_ConsumerDashboard
********************************************************************************************************
SUMMARY OF CHANGES

Date                    Author                    Comments
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
August 3, 2022          Rene Villarreal           Create original view
********************************************************************************************************/


CREATE VIEW		v_ShipDays_ConsumerDashboard
AS

SELECT 			COUNT(DISTINCT Date) as Month_Ship_Days
, 				COUNT(CASE WHEN Date < CAST( GETDATE() AS Date ) THEN 1 END) as Elapsed_Ship_Days
, 				COUNT(CASE WHEN Date >= CAST( GETDATE() AS Date ) THEN 1 END) as Remaining_Ship_Days
FROM 			ECM.HOLIDAYS
WHERE 			Date BETWEEN DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )), 0 )
AND 			DATEADD(DD, -1, DATEADD(MM, DATEDIFF(MM, 0, CAST( GETDATE() AS Date )) + 1, 0))
AND 			Weekday NOT IN ('1', '7')
AND 			Holiday = '0'
